specific_mechanism: Rasa theory: nine canonical aesthetic emotions (rasas) allocated across narrative; bhāva (latent emotion) resonates with rasa to produce evocation
llm_application: LLM aesthetic-mode spectral allocation: route nine canonical emotion-tokens across attention heads; the dominant rasa allocates the head-routing share to produce evocation.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes classical-Indian-poetics spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
